description: AWS (Amazon Web Services) is the world's leading cloud platform with 200+ services covering compute, storage, databases, AI/ML, networking, and more. Used by startups and Fortune 500 companies alike.
videoTitle: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner Full Course
nextSteps: Learn EC2, S3, and IAM fundamentals
